strings_sample: ["// PURPOSE:", "This file contains TR programs and rules that are only used by birds", "program BirdPerformTask", "// I added this so that tasks derived from aiTaskSimple can be used for", "// birds. AnimalPerformTask is set up to land first, so that most normal", "// tasks would just work by first landing, then performing the task on", "// ground.", "// TODO: I think aiTaskSimple implementations will need to specify that", "// they are flight tasks, if they are. The way it is right now, birds won't", "// land properly first for aiTaskSimple tasks that should be performed on ground. /FF", "HasSimpleTask", "PerformSimpleTask;", "TRUE", "AnimalPerformTask;", "program BirdFlee", "!FlightFlying && !CanMoveFlightTakeOff -> AnimalFleeWithBroadcast, SpeechEvent(\"AnimalFleeing\");", "!FlightFlying && CanMoveFlightTakeOff -> MoveFlightTakeOff, SpeechEvent(\"AnimalFleeing\");", "TRUE -> MoveFlightSoar, SpeechEvent(\"AnimalFleeing\");", "program BirdFlee(x)", "!FlightFlying && !CanMoveFlightTakeOff -> AnimalFleeWithBroadcast(x), SpeechEvent(\"AnimalFleeing\");", "//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------", "Main program used for birds.", "program BirdMain", "BirdMain1, AnimalMaybeStartle_tr, ConstrainValidSpacePriorityHighest;", "program BirdPerformTask0", "BirdPerformTask1, AnimalMaybeStartle_tr, ConstrainSpaceAllowedByTask;", "program BirdPerformTask1", "ObjectiveWander", "BirdPerformUnalerted;", "BirdPerformTask;", "program BirdMoveToValidSpace", "// For now, just make sure to land if we're constrained to a volume. /FF", "// TODO: At least, we should probably make sure that we don't take off again", "// if we're inside the volume we're constrained to. /FF", "FlightFlying && CanBirdLand", "BirdLand;", "// If the bird can't land, but is still in the air, just keep flying", "FlightFlying", "-> MoveFlightSoar;", "MoveToValidSpace;"]

strings_sample: ["//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------", "// Standard operating procedure for guards who are not currently aware of an enemy presence.", "// Goal:", "<none>", "// Precondition:", "NOT Enemy(x)", "// We have defeated (or forgotten?) all enemies.", "rules UnalertedHelper", "((EventActive(\"PlayerBump\", x) AND SpatialDistanceVeryClose(x) AND BumpedIntoMeVeryRecently(x)) OR", "(BumpedIntoMeJustNow(x) AND Player(x)))", "AND CanMoveAwayFrom(x)", "BasePlayerJustBumpedIntoMe(x);", "RecentProjectileImpact(x)", "AnyRecentProjectileImpact;", "program Unalerted", "// If the player bumps us and we consider ourselves dangerous, stare him down for a little -JM", "//BasePlayerJustBumpedIntoMe(x)", "Stay, LookIntentlyAtIfPossible(x), SpeechEvent(\"PlayerBump\", x);", "// Bumping should always be allowed unless disabled in script", "IsBumpingAllowed && Player(x) && !OnSameVehicleOrMountAsMe(x) && SpatialMovingTowardsMe(x)", "(SpatialDistanceExtremelyClose(x)) && (SpatialRunning(x) || SpatialSprinting(x))", "-> BeBumped(x);", "// If I'm a horse and have a player riding me, and I've bumped somebody just now, play speech audio for it, since the above won't do it", "IsBumpingAllowed && Player(y) && !OnSameVehicleOrMountAsMe(y) && RidingOn(y, x) && BumpedIntoMeJustNow(x) -> SpeechEvent(\"BumpedIntoMe\", y);", "// Behavior for the \"LAW_HOSTILE\" faction relation. /FF", "// - This was moved to take precedence over the CaughtInGunfight program, which would otherwise", "//   have a tendency to prevent it from working if there are multiple actors and some start shooting. /FF", "LawHostile(x) && CanBeLawHostileAgainst(x) && SpatialDistanceVeryClose(x)", "BeLawHostileAgainst(x);", "LawHostile(x) && CanBeLawHostileAgainst(x)", "// Act in a hostile fashion against x, if appropriate. The SpatialDistanceVeryClose(x)", "// here is only to add a preference towards nearby targets, and isn't critical. /FF", "Hostile(x) && CanBeHostileAgainst(x) && SpatialDistanceVeryClose(x)", "BeHostileAgainst(x);", "Hostile(x) && CanBeHostileAgainst(x)", "// This \"hostile behavior\" was disabled, didn't work very well. See #166359: \"Ped reactions to dishonorable players is really messy\". /FF", "TRUE -> ConstrainValidSpacePriorityUnalerted, RespectStandGoalPriorityUnalerted, Unalerted2, DeadBodyLook;", "program ConstrainValidSpacePriorityUnalerted", "StayInValidSpacePriorityUnalerted", "ConstrainValidSpace;"]

SpatialDistanceFar(x);", "SpatialLastObservedDistanceVeryFar(x) && PositionKnownRecently(x)", "-> SpatialDistanceVeryFar(x);", "// This is a helper predicate for determining whether we know the direction to object x reliably or not:", "PositionKnownVeryRecently(x) || (PositionKnownRecently(x) && !SpatialLastObservedDistanceClose(x))", "-> SpatialDirectionToKnown(x);", "// Predicates for the direction to object x relative to us.", "SpatialLastObservedDirectionBehindMe(x) && SpatialDirectionToKnown(x)", "-> SpatialDirectionBehindMe(x);", "SpatialLastObservedDirectionAheadOfMe(x) && SpatialDirectionToKnown(x)", "-> SpatialDirectionAheadOfMe(x);", "SpatialLastObservedDirectionLeftOfMe(x) && SpatialDirectionToKnown(x)", "-> SpatialDirectionLeftOfMe(x);", "SpatialLastObservedDirectionRightOfMe(x) && SpatialDirectionToKnown(x)", "-> SpatialDirectionRightOfMe(x);", "SpatialLastObservedDirectionAboveMe(x) && SpatialDirectionToKnown(x)", "-> SpatialDirectionAboveMe(x);", "SpatialLastObservedDirectionBelowMe(x) && SpatialDirectionToKnown(x)", "-> SpatialDirectionBelowMe(x);", "SpatialLastObservedDirBoolLeftOfMe(x) && SpatialDirectionToKnown(x)", "-> SpatialDirBoolLeftOfMe(x);", "SpatialLastObservedDirBoolRightOfMe(x) && SpatialDirectionToKnown(x)", "-> SpatialDirBoolRightOfMe(x);", "// Helper predicate for the
